CustomField.description: Auto-maintained by the Insurance recalculation flow. TRUE when the contact currently holds at least one active-policy insurance (ContactInsuranceAssociation where the linked Insurance Status = Active). Do not edit manually. (활성 보험 보유 여부 - 자동 계산, 수동 편집 금지)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated from the contact's active insurance associations; do not edit manually. (활성 보험 연결에서 자동 계산됩니다. 수동 편집 금지.)
CustomField.label: Has Active Insurance
